hero.description: Historic cave rooms, breathtaking terrace, and the warmth of a local family welcome in the heart of Göreme.

about.subtitle: Sato Cave Hotel
about.title_part_1: An authentic cave hotel in the heart of Göreme, offering comfortable rooms, warm hospitality, and unforgettable views of
about.description: Carved into the volcanic tuff rock of Cappadocia over centuries, Sato Cave Hotel is a lovingly restored historic property that blends authentic cave rooms with modern comforts. Wake each morning to the sight of hot air balloons drifting over fairy chimneys from our panoramic terrace, and start your day with a traditional Turkish breakfast.

rooms.description: Experience the ultimate in comfort and style by choosing the perfect room tailored to your needs.

facilities.description: Experience the ultimate in comfort and style by choosing the perfect room tailored to your needs.

sights.description: We offer a range of world-class facilities to ensure your stay is both comfortable and memorable.

reviews.title: The Words of Our Guest!
reviews.description: From luxurious rooms and top-notch amenities to friendly staff and authentic dining, our guests share their honest feedback.

footer.description: Nestled in the heart of Goreme, Sato Cave Hotel is a lovingly restored historic property offering authentic cave rooms and panoramic views of Cappadocia's fairy chimneys.
footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe for exclusive offers and hotel updates.
footer.rights: Sato Cave Hotel. All rights reserved.

rooms_page.subtitle: Accommodations
rooms_page.title: Our Rooms & Suites
rooms_page.description: Eight uniquely designed retreats, each offering a distinct experience of coastal luxury and serene comfort.

white-stone-room-bathtub.name: White Stone Room with Bathtub
white-stone-room-bathtub.tagline: Minimalist elegance meets the timeless architecture of ancient vaulted ceilings
white-stone-room-bathtub.description: White Stone Room posesses a minimal style that contrasts with the ancient architecture of vaulted ceilings and stone walls that are typical of the region.

arena-stone-room-bathtub.name: Arena Stone Room with Bathtub
arena-stone-room-bathtub.tagline: A mystical and romantic retreat surrounded by soft, organic textures
arena-stone-room-bathtub.description: With its mystical and romantic style, Arena Stone Room will surprise you as soon as you enter, offering a warm and soft atmosphere surrounded by organic textures and details.

cooper-cave.name: Cooper Cave
cooper-cave.tagline: A masterpiece of restoration featuring hand-carved historical walls
cooper-cave.description: The unique and indispensible part of this room is the product of a meticulous restoration work. Original and historical walls carved by hand accompanied by harmonious colors and eloborate decoration.

olive-cave.name: Olive Cave
olive-cave.tagline: A daring yet simple atmosphere designed for an intimate grotto experience
olive-cave.description: A fresh but daring atmosphere, which will allow you to live an intimate experience. With a perfect balance between simplicity and textures and special small details.

black-stone-room-bathtub.name: Black Stone Room with Bathtub
black-stone-room-bathtub.tagline: Journey through a private tunnel to your own stylish chateau-inspired sanctuary
black-stone-room-bathtub.description: Black Stone Room is located at the end of a tunnel which will make you feel like you are in a true 'chateau'. Romance is the first thing you think of when entering this original, stylish room.

moon-cave.name: Moon Cave
moon-cave.tagline: Dreamy tones and seductive colors in the deepest heart of the hotel
moon-cave.description: Designed with its own distinctive character, carefully preserved to make you feel in a different world. With dreamy taste and seductive colors, it will be a privilege to spend time in the deepest heart of Sato Cave Hotel.

amber-cave.name: Amber Cave
amber-cave.tagline: A synthesis of centuries of history with rich textiles and exclusive comfort
amber-cave.description: The perfect synthesis of rich decoration and tradition, providing beautiful textile furniture and large areas to provide you with al the comfort and exclusivity that has been collected in a space with centuries of history.

almond-cave-bathtub.name: Almond Cave with Bathtub
almond-cave-bathtub.tagline: A remote natural refuge featuring a luxurious private jacuzzi
almond-cave-bathtub.description: A natural refuge, providing you with luxury and intimacy, enabling you to relax for hours in the jacuzzi located inside the most remote cave that the Sato has.
highlights: The hotel's most remote and private cave

activities.description: Discover unforgettable experiences and adventures right at our doorstep.

hot_air_balloons.title: Hot Air Balloons
hot_air_balloons.short_text: Fly over fairy chimneys at sunrise.
hot_air_balloons.description: Experience the magic of Cappadocia from above. Drift peacefully over the stunning  landscape of fairy chimneys and volcanic rock formations as the sun rises, painting the sky in vibrant colors.

horseback_riding.title: Horseback Riding
horseback_riding.description: Known as the 'Land of Beautiful Horses', Cappadocia is perfect for horseback riding. Explore the hidden trails, lush valleys, and ancient rock formations on a guided sunset or sunrise tour.

green_tour.title: Green Tour
green_tour.short_text: Discover the underground cities and Ihlara Valley.
green_tour.description: A comprehensive whole-day journey through the southern part of Cappadocia. Hike through the stunning Ihlara Valley, visit the massive Derinkuyu Underground City, and explore the Selime Monastery.

red_tour.title: Red Tour
red_tour.short_text: Explore iconic fairy chimneys and open-air museums.
red_tour.description: The classic Cappadocian experience. Visit the famous Goreme Open Air Museum, marvel at the unique rock formations in Devrent and Pasabag Valleys, and witness traditional pottery making in Avanos.

pottery_making.title: Pottery Making in Avanos
pottery_making.description: Avanos is famous for its pottery traditions dating back to the Hittites. Visit a local workshop, watch master artisans shape the red clay from the Kizilirmak River, and try making your own piece.

underground_cities.title: Underground Cities
underground_cities.short_text: Journey deep into ancient subterranean worlds.
underground_cities.description: Descend into the incredible multi-level underground cities like Kaymakli or Derinkuyu. Explore the intricate labyrinths of tunnels, hidden rooms, wineries, and ventilation shafts built by early Christians.
